Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Mar-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Objections To Accounts; And Petition For Surcharge; Suspension And Removal Of Trustee, And For Appointment Of Temporary And Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for University of California, Berkley Foundation.

Mr. Barringer stated that they were still near settlement, that the financial information was trickling in and that they were very close to getting the matter settled. The matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the matter is not going off calendar on that date, opposing Counsel is to appear.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Objections To Accounts; And Petition For Surcharge; Suspension And Removal Of Trustee, And For Appointment Of Temporary And Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Objections To Accounts; And Petition For Surcharge; Suspension And Removal Of Trustee, And For Appointment Of Temporary And Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Continued To Jan-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for the University of California, Berkeley Foundation. Marta Daetwyler for Sabrina Lake.

Mr. Barringer stated that the parties were in the process of working out an agreement which would result in a dismissal without prejudice based on certain representations by the respondents regarding the efforts to sell the property in Berkeley, that things are in progress, and that it is the desire of both Counsel to move to a resolution. The matter was continued to January 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.
